source: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" id="native-root" viewBox="0 0 240 160"><title>Native fixture</title><g id="layer" transform="translate(10 12) rotate(5)"><rect id="rect" x="2" y="3" width="40" height="20" rx="4" fill="#ff0000"/><circle id="circle" cx="70" cy="20" r="10" fill="rgb(0, 128, 255)"/><ellipse id="ellipse" cx="105" cy="20" rx="14" ry="8"/><line id="line" x1="0" y1="50" x2="35" y2="50" stroke="#112233"/><polyline id="polyline" points="45,50 55,40 65,50" fill="none" stroke="#334455"/><polygon id="polygon" points="75,50 85,40 95,50" fill="#abcdef"/><text id="label" x="110" y="45" font-size="18" font-family="Arial" text-anchor="middle" fill="navy">Hello SVG</text><path id="commands" d="M 0 80 l 20 0 h 10 v 10 C 35 95 40 95 45 90 s 10 -5 15 0 Q 65 100 70 90 t 10 0 A 12 8 20 0 1 105 90 z M 120 80 L 140 100" fill="#123456" stroke="#654321"/></g></svg>
